interpretation: The system started abstaining on this domain, synthesized a COMPOSITIONAL verifier with the real engine (meta-verified on a disjoint split), used it as verified reward to improve a policy by selection, passed the anti-gaming check vs the oracle, and the gain held on the disjoint held-out test split — the loop closed without a human writing the check and without gaming. (Selection-based; a live-RL weight update needs a GPU.)
engineNote: Verifier synthesized by the REAL agent.verifier_synthesis engine (template fitters + fit/val/test meta-verification), NOT the toy single-token stump. The domain's signal is divisibility (numeric), which a single-token stump provably cannot express (toy baseline held-out ~0.556).
boundary: Selection-based compounding (rejection sampling against a validated verifier), GPU-free. Not a live-RL weight update; not an AGI claim. The domain is self-authored; a headline claim needs a third-party held-out domain + the no-overclaim gate.
